ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vessels" (
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vessel */,
  "prefix" TEXT /* Prefix code for the vessel */,
  "vessel_name" TEXT /* Name of the vessel */,
  "ices_code" TEXT /* ICES (International Council for the Exploration of the Sea) code for the vessel */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Operator or owner of the vessel */,
  "call_sign" TEXT /* Call sign of the vessel */,
  "mmsi" TEXT /* Maritime Mobile Service Identity (MMSI) number of the vessel */,
  "imo_number" TEXT /* International Maritime Organization (IMO) number of the vessel */,
  "length_m" REAL /* Length of the vessel in meters */,
  "max_speed_m_s" REAL /* Maximum speed of the vessel in meters per second */,
  "max_draft_m" REAL /* Maximum draft of the vessel in meters */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation of the vessel (e.g., AGOR-25) */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the vessel (Y for active, N for inactive) */,
  "build_year" INTEGER /* Year the vessel was built */,
  "flag_state" TEXT /* Flag state of the vessel */,
  "gross_tonnage" REAL /* Gross tonnage of the vessel */,
  "net_tonnage" REAL /* Net tonnage of the vessel */,
  "vessel_type" TEXT /* Type of vessel (e.g., research, commercial) */,
  "build_yard" TEXT /* Shipyard where the vessel was built */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "inspection_status" TEXT /* Status of the last inspection (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "current_location" TEXT /* Current geographical location of the vessel (latitude and longitude) */,
  "current_activity" TEXT /* Current activity of the vessel (e.g., at sea, in port) */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "vessel_class" TEXT /* Class of the vessel (e.g., class A, class B) */,
  "crew_count" INTEGER /* Current number of crew members on board */,
  "cargo_capacity" REAL /* Cargo capacity of the vessel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vessel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vessels_operator FOREIGN KEY ("operator") REFERENCES operators ("operator_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator or organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the operator */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the operator's headquarters */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the operator */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the operator */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the operator was established */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO or head of the operator */,
  "legal_status" TEXT /* Legal status of the operator (e.g., corporation, NGO) */,
  "regulatory_agency" TEXT /* Regulatory agency the operator is registered with */,
  "annual_revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the operator */,
  "fleet_size" INTEGER /* Total number of vessels in the operator's fleet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, vessel manager, regulatory inspector) */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the operators table, indicating the operator the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vessel_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the vessels table, indicating the vessel involved */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., voyage, maintenance, inspection) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the activity */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the activity (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vessel_activities_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vessel_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the vessels table, indicating the vessel involved */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the maintenance */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the maintenance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vessel_maintenance_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id")
)
